headline: Texas Pacific Land Ties Permian Acreage To Data Infrastructure Growth
summary: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) is committing US$50 million to data infrastructure, expanding beyond its traditional energy royalty model. The move introduces a new revenue stream tied to data related uses of its land holdings. This development follows a week in which most market attention around the stock centered on valuation and historical share performance. Texas Pacific Land has long been known for its energy related royalties across its extensive land position in Texas. By putting US$50...
